headline.primary_headline: 5 WARNING SIGNS of CARPAL TUNNEL Syndrome
headline.subheadline: ...and what to do if you're in pain right NOW!
headline.alternate_headline: NUMB HANDS? Tender Wrists? Fingers Tingle When You Drive?
headline.promise_compression: Identify your carpal tunnel symptoms + get immediate solution

curiosity_architecture.incomplete_pattern: What are the 5 warning signs? Do I have them?

schema_analysis.existing_schema: Carpal tunnel requires surgery or braces
schema_analysis.new_schema: The source of pain may not be in your wrist - chiropractic can fix it without surgery
schema_analysis.bridge_mechanism: Educational content revealing true source of pain + Progressive Rehab approach

headline.vsl_adaptation: If you have numbness, tingling, or pain in your hands... what if the problem ISN'T actually in your wrist?

lead.opening_verbatim: Even the Best Doctors Make This Mistake! If you cut a finger or bump your knee, there's no need to guess where the trouble is. It's right where it hurts! That's why carpal tunnel syndrome is so tricky. Because the source of the pain may NOT be where you feel the aching, tingling, and numbness. Many regular doctors make this dangerous mistake.
lead.transition_to_body: The pain can actually be a smokescreen, and the source of your misery may be hiding somewhere else...

mechanism.mechanism_description: Carpal tunnel pain often originates 'upstream' in the arm, shoulder, and neck - not in the wrist. Health Source's Progressive Rehab approach combines chiropractic adjustments, therapy, and training to address all involved areas rather than just treating the symptom location. This is why surgery and braces often fail.
mechanism.mechanism_verbatim: The biggest blunder consists of treating only ONE area when more are involved. Even surgery will seldom give complete relief (sometimes none at all) because it doesn't fix the problems back up in the arm and neck.

warning_signs.name: Electric Fingers
warning_signs.description: Pain in thumb and middle finger, mostly on front side - but it usually starts 'upstream' in arm, shoulder and neck

warning_signs.name: Wrist Toothache
warning_signs.description: Wrist feels swollen, tender and achy in front - probably NOT carpal tunnel if pain is on back of hand

warning_signs.name: Straight Neck X-ray
warning_signs.description: Neck straight as a stick when it should have gradual curve - can lead to faster arthritis

warning_signs.name: Vise in Forearm
warning_signs.description: Tightness and pressure grabbing arm - worse when pushing mower or trimming bushes

warning_signs.name: Asleep at the Wheel
warning_signs.description: Hands wake you up at night or go to sleep while driving

narrative_flow.key_insight: The biggest blunder consists of treating only ONE area when more are involved. Even surgery will seldom give complete relief because it doesn't fix the problems back up in the arm and neck.

testimonial.quote: My major complaint was neck and lower back pain with numbness in my left fingers. Health Source was able to address the problem that was creating the numbness in my hand, neck and low back. They tailored a specific regime of adjustments, exercises and stretches. Now my neck and back pain are a thing of the past and the numbness is gone, too.
